knowledge_hooks.hook: Use Belly & The Chef when a Malaysia F&B group is still collecting punch cards; one platform can replace outlet-by-outlet attendance admin.
knowledge_hooks.pain: Punch-card collection, leave/MC handling, announcements, and attendance visibility were hard to control across six outlets.
knowledge_hooks.outcome: The public case page positions StaffAny as one-platform scheduling and real-time attendance support for the group.
knowledge_hooks.best_fit_prospect_pattern: MY F&B groups with multi-outlet punch-card, leave, MC, announcement, or real-time attendance pain.
